# WAKE.md - Project State

## Current State

DECISION: Morpheus checks coding-agent claims against project sources.
DECISION: Morpheus builds datasets only from accepted source-backed claims.
DECISION: The autonomous lab can use strict machine acceptance for benchmark fixtures.
DECISION: The learning core writes audit artifacts for each lab run.
DECISION: The MLX backend is the local Apple Silicon training path.
DECISION: LlamaFactory remains a future CUDA/Linux backend.
DECISION: Receipts audit project-state compilation.
DECISION: MCP tools expose local truth-layer state.
